query:
SELECT g.id, g.nome, g.telefone,
  CASE WHEN g.telefone IS NULL OR g.telefone = '' THEN 'SEM TELEFONE' 
       WHEN UPPER(g.nome) LIKE '%TESTE TESTE%' THEN 'TESTE'
       WHEN g.id IN (SELECT gestanteId FROM partosRealizados WHERE gestanteId IS NOT NULL) THEN 'TEM PARTO'
       WHEN g.id IN (SELECT gestanteId FROM abortamentos WHERE gestanteId IS NOT NULL) THEN 'TEM ABORTAMENTO'
       ELSE 'ATIVA' END AS status
FROM gestantes g
HAVING status != 'ATIVA'
ORDER BY status, g.nome

SELECT g.id, g.nome, g.telefone,
  CASE WHEN g.telefone IS NULL OR g.telefone = '' THEN 'SEM TELEFONE' 
       WHEN UPPER(g.nome) LIKE '%TESTE TESTE%' THEN 'TESTE'
       WHEN g.id IN (SELECT gestanteId FROM partosRealizados WHERE gestanteId IS NOT NULL) THEN 'TEM PARTO'
       WHEN g.id IN (SELECT gestanteId FROM abortamentos WHERE gestanteId IS NOT NULL) THEN 'TEM ABORTAMENTO'
       ELSE 'ATIVA' END AS status
FROM gestantes g
HAVING status != 'ATIVA'
ORDER BY status, g.nome
